headline: More troubled Oakland, California, properties reportedly head to auction
summary: The two buildings, less than a mile apart, will hit the sales block after their owner defaulted on more than $50 million in loans, according to The East Bay Times.

headline: CubeSmart (CUBE) Target Increased to $45 by Barclays Following Self-Storage REIT Review
summary: CubeSmart (NYSE:CUBE) is included among the 13 Best REIT Dividend Stocks to Invest in. On March 5, Barclays analyst Brendan Lynch raised the firm’s price recommendation on CubeSmart (NYSE:CUBE) to $45 from $43 and maintained an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The firm updated its models for self-storage real estate investment trusts following the […]
